description: A React functional component implementing a newsletter signup section with email input, subscribe button, styled with Tailwind CSS, and a state-based submission confirmation.

methods.name: NewsletterSignup
methods.description: React functional component rendering a newsletter signup form with email input, submit handling, and UI styling.

methods.name: handleSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission; prevents default, updates submission state, and resets email input.
